author: @kingflares2
text: Its been awhwile addicted to yakuza. But more older videos and a stream saturday. But this is a big in terms of content. More screenshots will be in discord for those curious. You can find the ads on Rednote. Like there are ads. like for MMO boosting, but the boosters are just... on it. I'm not here to debate whether you think its ok. But they are comfortable enough to show their account ids. So I guess this is valid. A minor thing is that some NA CCs use their services apparently.  At least one of their ads mention they are so good, some "Western" CC pays them regularly to tout their skills. I'll post more images on my dc, and if I find some more I'll post it for those curious. This is the best done one. There are like a couple this past week. Again, this exist in every game, just like RMT. But I guess Mori is small enough and the devs need the money enough, people can be this blatant. Especially when this breaks the ToS
video_title: [Morimens] Uncovering the very blatant endgame boosting service in CN, with official CCs.

text: 사야의 종족이 설정상 차원을 넘나들며 자기 존재들을 인식하거나 혹은 관심을 가진 순간 그 세계에 침투해서 씨앗을 퍼트리는 것 이었다면, 어쩌면 사야가 후미노리를 사랑해서 그를 고쳐놓고 마주할수없어서 도피했을때 이렇게 콜라보를 암시하던 것이었을까. 그렇다면 고립엔딩이... 좋아질지도
